stemHtml: Which of the following statements concerning airborne weather radar is correct?

options.a: The indication on the plan position indicator represents the amount (mm/h) of water vapour within clouds.
options.b: It shows the areas which are dangerous for aircraft icing. The intensity levels for aircraft icing as defined by ICAO are indicated by contour lines.
options.c: It can also be used for proximity warning and anti-collision protection.
options.d: It shows on a plan position indicator the areas of precipitation of rain, snow and/or hail.
